title: Tick Control in Floral Park, Queens | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Floral Park, Queens starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts, same-day service available.
intro: Floral Park's tree-lined streets, well-maintained gardens, and proximity to parks create ideal habitats for ticks that threaten your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services throughout Floral Park, from the historic homes near the border to properties surrounding Creedmoor State Park. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks at all life stages while keeping your outdoor spaces safe for enjoyment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of specialized tick control experience to Floral Park, using EPA-approved products that are effective yet safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand Queens' unique tick populations and provide customized treatment plans with seasonal follow-ups to ensure year-round protection for your property.
localContext: Floral Park's beautiful residential properties with mature landscaping and proximity to green spaces like Cunningham Park make tick prevention essential for homeowners. The neighborhood's mix of single-family homes with yards and gardens requires vigilant tick control, especially during peak season from April through October when residents enjoy their outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Floral Park's abundant vegetation, mature trees, and proximity to parks create perfect tick habitats. Ticks carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional control essential for protecting your family and pets who enjoy yards and nearby green spaces.

faqs.question: What does your tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of tick-prone areas like lawn perimeters, shrubs, and wooded edges, application of long-lasting tick control products, and follow-up visits during peak season to maintain protection throughout the warmer months.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: We recommend initial treatment in early spring (April) followed by monthly or bi-monthly applications through October. Properties backing onto wooded areas or near parks may benefit from more frequent treatments during peak tick season from May through September.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are highly effective against ticks but safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Treated areas are typically safe for children and pets to return within 2-4 hours after application, and we provide specific re-entry instructions after each service.
